steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The task requires emphasizing a difference between quintidi and decadi. The correct answer must use explicit contrast language and show what made each type of day distinct from the other.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — One quintidi during the month of Thermidor was named after an animal, the ram.: discusses only one type of day without drawing a contrast to the other. ✗
  • Choice B — Each quintidi in the calendar honored an animal, such as the ram, whereas each decadi honored an agricultural tool, such as the sieve.: directly contrasts the two day types using "whereas" — quintidi honored animals (the ram), decadi honored tools (the sieve). ✓
  • Choice C — There were ten days in each week of the French Republican calendar, and two of these days were called quintidi and decadi.: fails to draw a distinction between the two types of days. ✗
  • Choice D — Each decadi was named after an agricultural tool; for example, a decadi during the month of Nivôse was named after the sieve.: discusses only one type of day without drawing a contrast to the other. ✗
B is correct.
